author: IGN RSS
text:
Theos: Cities of Myth Is a Promising Ancient Greek City-Builder | IGN Preview
Theos: Cities of Myth is a charming indie city builder that had me laying out roads, providing housing, taking advantage of godly boons, and managing resources as concrete as food and as abstract as philosophy. I wasn't able to build a polis to rival the height of Athens just yet due to demo restrictions and some odd pathing bugs, however.
